assignments.name: brand_tone
assignments.value: 친근하지만 전문적, 1인칭 단수, 한국어 (영상이 영어면 영어로). 과장된 표현·이모지 자제.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.notes: 채널 ID는 .env의 YOUTUBE_CHANNEL_ID. 브랜드 톤·키워드 풀은 여기서 수정. transcript_api 옵션은 supadata / youtube-transcript / apify.

nodes.name: Fetch Transcript
nodes.notes: SETUP.md의 transcript API 옵션 참고. supadata.ai 또는 apify·youtube-transcript-api로 교체 가능.

values.content:
=You are analyzing a YouTube video transcript to extract reusable content building blocks.

Return STRICT JSON:
{
  "core_message": "<one-sentence thesis of the video>",
  "chapters": [{"title":"...","summary":"..."}],
  "pull_quotes": ["...","...","..."],
  "target_keyword": "<one from: {{ $('Config').first().json.target_keyword_pool.join(', ') }}, or 'other'>",
  "audience": "<persona in one phrase>"
}

No prose, no markdown, no code fences. Output language: match transcript language.

=You are writing a SEO-optimized blog post derived from a YouTube video.

Brand tone: {{ $('Config').first().json.brand_tone }}

Requirements:
- 1500-2500 chars body (Korean) or 1500-2500 words (English) — match transcript language
- Structure: H1 + intro (3 lines) + 3-5 H2 sections + conclusion
- Use the chapters and pull_quotes from input as anchors
- Embed the original video link near top: <iframe-style markdown link>
- End with one CTA line

Return STRICT JSON:
{
  "meta_title": "<<=60 chars>",
  "meta_desc": "<<=155 chars>",
  "body_markdown": "<full body, no front-matter>"
}

=You are writing an X (Twitter) thread from a YouTube video.

Brand tone: {{ $('Config').first().json.brand_tone }}

Requirements:
- 8-10 tweets total
- Tweet 1: strong hook (<280 chars), no link
- Tweets 2-N: one insight per tweet, each <=280 chars
- Last tweet: include the video link + 1-line CTA
- Use chapters as content backbone
- Match transcript language

Return STRICT JSON:
{
  "tweets": ["tweet 1", "tweet 2", ...]
}

=You are writing a LinkedIn post from a YouTube video.

Brand tone: {{ $('Config').first().json.brand_tone }} (slightly more professional)

Requirements:
- 1000-1500 chars
- Hook in first 2 lines (LinkedIn truncates)
- 3-4 short paragraphs separated by blank lines
- 1 personal angle / takeaway
- End with: video link + question to prompt comments
- No hashtag spam (max 3)
- Match transcript language

Return STRICT JSON:
{
  "post": "<full LinkedIn post text>"
}
